mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYSLIPS ( WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, FROM_DATE, TO_DATE, HOURLY_WAGE, WORKED_DAYS, WORKED_MINUTES, BASE_WAGE, BONUS_AMOUNT, DEDUCTION_AMOUNT, TOTAL_WAGE, DAILY_SNAPSHOT, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{workplaceId}, #{userId}, #{fromDate}, #{toDate}, #{hourlyWage}, #{workedDays}, #{workedMinutes}, #{baseWage}, #{bonusAmount}, #{deductionAmount}, #{totalWage}, #{dailySnapshot}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.ID, p.WORKPLACE_ID, p.USER_ID, p.FROM_DATE, p.TO_DATE, p.HOURLY_WAGE, p.WORKED_DAYS, p.WORKED_MINUTES, p.BASE_WAGE, p.BONUS_AMOUNT, p.BONUS_NOTE, p.DEDUCTION_AMOUNT, p.DEDUCTION_NOTE, p.TOTAL_WAGE, p.DAILY_SNAPSHOT, p.STATUS, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT, u.NAME AS USER_NAME, u.PROFILE_COLOR FROM PAYSLIPS p JOIN USERS u ON u.ID = p.USER_ID WHERE p.ID = #{id}

SELECT p.ID, p.WORKPLACE_ID, p.USER_ID, p.FROM_DATE, p.TO_DATE, p.HOURLY_WAGE, p.WORKED_DAYS, p.WORKED_MINUTES, p.BASE_WAGE, p.BONUS_AMOUNT, p.BONUS_NOTE, p.DEDUCTION_AMOUNT, p.DEDUCTION_NOTE, p.TOTAL_WAGE, p.DAILY_SNAPSHOT, p.STATUS, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT, u.NAME AS USER_NAME, u.PROFILE_COLOR FROM PAYSLIPS p JOIN USERS u ON u.ID = p.USER_ID WHERE p.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND p.STATUS != 'CANCELLED' AND DATE(p.CREATED_AT) BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE PAYSLIPS SET BONUS_AMOUNT = #{bonusAmount}, BONUS_NOTE = #{bonusNote}, DEDUCTION_AMOUNT = #{deductionAmount}, DEDUCTION_NOTE = #{deductionNote}, TOTAL_WAGE = #{totalWage} WHERE ID = #{id}
